description: 5-point natural Pareto front WITHOUT forced ecosystems. Yandex happens to make the best lamps (zigbee ultra q=0.98), aqara the best sensors (q=0.95), tuya the best plugs (zigbee ultra q=0.97). Each additional hub+ecosystem unlocks a strictly higher quality tier: H=0E=1 (Q=0.913) → H=1E=1 yandex-zigbee (Q=0.9475) → H=1E=2 all-aqara (Q=0.950) → H=2E=2 yandex-lamp+aqara-rest (Q=0.952) → H=3E=3 all-ultra (Q=0.953). Demonstrates naturally increasing quality with complexity. Both algorithms should agree on all 5 points. BF ~1s.
